status_vocabulary.pass: The frozen legacy case is required to satisfy the case oracle.
status_vocabulary.known-fail: The case must reproduce the pinned failure_class; an unexpected pass is rejected.
status_vocabulary.blocked: The product command must reproduce the pinned non-executable failure_class.
status_vocabulary.discovery-required: Only --discover may run this case. Discovery never emits the canonical PASS line and cannot enter a formal scenario report.

resolution_policy.coverage: Every generated case in all six primary model/backend lanes must resolve to exactly one most-specific rule.
resolution_policy.formal_rule: Canonical collection rejects a lane while any resolved case is discovery-required.
resolution_policy.amendment_rule: A discovery observation must be reviewed in an independent commit that replaces discovery-required with pass, known-fail, or blocked before formal collection is rerun.
resolution_policy.mismatch_rule: Unexpected fail, unexpected pass, failure-class drift, missing coverage, or ambiguous equal-specificity rules are hard failures.

blocked_lane_policy.rule: Blocked is allowed only for the two frozen legacy Metal lanes that have explicit unsupported-backend evidence. CUDA lanes must execute discovery and then formal correctness cases; blocked cannot substitute for product execution.

rules.evidence_basis: Frozen cff4 M1 CUDA discovery report sha256:97782c70a14ce622a50643ad652a4b3466fbebbec7bb5334c1636e9e0e54b932, independently validated by sha256:3ea76962b94f69412585bc47826f8028dda89ed892cc87f4c31ddb038bbde99e, observed 20 matching cases.
rules.next_action: Reproduce this frozen failure in G00 and make the final contract pass in G08A.

rules.evidence_basis: MODEL_MATRIX.md and G00_BASELINE.md explicitly classify Qwen3.5-4B Metal as currently unsupported.
rules.next_action: Implement and validate the new Metal lane in G08A; do not fabricate a legacy baseline.

rules.evidence_basis: Historical W3 artifacts predate the frozen G00 case corpus and do not prove every C01-C21 case at cff4c477.
rules.next_action: Run --discover on the pinned 1x RTX 4090 lane and amend every unresolved case expectation.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 L0 TEMPLATE PASS and official config probes cover Qwen3.5-35B-A3B metadata and template semantics.
rules.next_action: Reproduce with the frozen binary and pinned metadata.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 L2 QUANTIZED PASS includes actual-model known-answer product cases through run and serve.
rules.next_action: Reproduce the larger G00 deterministic corpus.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 real-product and L3 artifacts include successful non-stream OpenAI chat responses.
rules.next_action: Reproduce the G00 known-answer corpus.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 L3 BEHAVIOR artifacts cover stream/non-stream consistency, one DONE marker, and usage.
rules.next_action: Reproduce all G00 stream cases.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 L4 AGENT PASS preserves diagnostic evidence for the legacy temperature-zero, enable_thinking=false required-tool path, but it does not prove either generated P_NO_THINKING/P_THINKING case set.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for both frozen thinking presets; retain the old temperature-zero result only as diagnostic evidence until an exact generated case is observed.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 L4 AGENT PASS preserves diagnostic evidence for twenty legacy temperature-zero, enable_thinking=false strict-schema cases; it does not prove the generated 50-case non-thinking and 20-case thinking matrix.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for every generated preset/constraint case; keep the legacy twenty-case result as diagnostic evidence only.

rules.evidence_basis: W3 L5 CONCURRENCY PASS covers actual-model c1/c4/c16/c32 completion and error gates.
rules.next_action: Reproduce with typed admission and observed max-active evidence.

rules.evidence_basis: MODEL_MATRIX.md and G00_BASELINE.md explicitly classify Qwen3.5-35B-A3B Metal as currently unsupported.
rules.next_action: Implement and validate the new Metal lane in G08B; do not fabricate a legacy baseline.

rules.evidence_basis: Existing G0 CUDA gates prove a required subset, not the complete new C01-C21 corpus.
rules.next_action: Run --discover for uncovered cases and amend the catalog before formal collection.

rules.evidence_basis: g0_cuda4090_full paris correctness gate and actual Qwen3-30B product artifacts.
rules.next_action: Reproduce the expanded deterministic corpus.

rules.evidence_basis: g0_cuda4090_full requires both two-round and three-round multi-turn Paris gates.
rules.next_action: Reproduce ten independent three-round groups.

rules.evidence_basis: g0_cuda4090_full validates non-stream chat before performance.
rules.next_action: Reproduce the G00 known-answer corpus.

rules.evidence_basis: g0_cuda4090_full preserves diagnostic evidence for the legacy temperature-zero/model-default tool_call_regression, but it does not prove generated P_NO_THINKING/P_THINKING required-tool cases.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for the generated hard-thinking preset cases; retain the legacy temperature-zero/model-default result as diagnostic evidence only.

rules.evidence_basis: g0_cuda4090_full requires concurrency quality and c1/c4/c16/c32 coverage.
rules.next_action: Reproduce with typed admission and observed max-active evidence.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README gate proves a required subset, not the complete new C01-C21 corpus.
rules.next_action: Run --discover for uncovered cases and amend the catalog before formal collection.

rules.evidence_basis: validate_metal_readme_regression requires Qwen3-30B run and serve correctness.
rules.next_action: Reproduce the expanded deterministic corpus.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression requires run JSONL multi-turn correctness.
rules.next_action: Reproduce ten independent three-round groups.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression preserves diagnostic evidence for a max_tokens=256 text-mode multi-turn smoke; it does not prove three runs that each emit at least 512 output tokens.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for the explicit >=512-token cases; retain the old 256-token-cap smoke as diagnostic evidence only.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression requires non-stream serve correctness.
rules.next_action: Reproduce the G00 known-answer corpus.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression preserves diagnostic evidence for stream output, multiple chunks, and one DONE marker; it does not prove twenty prompt-paired stream/non-stream content, finish-reason, and usage equivalence cases.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for the complete paired C05/C06 matrix; retain the old stream framing result as diagnostic evidence only.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression preserves diagnostic evidence for six independent one-turn sanity requests; it does not prove six conversations with five history-carrying rounds each.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for six five-round history-carrying loops; retain the old stateless sanity result as diagnostic evidence only.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression preserves diagnostic evidence for the legacy temperature-zero/model-default openai_tool_call_regression; it does not prove generated P_NO_THINKING/P_THINKING required-tool cases.
rules.next_action: Run discovery for generated hard-thinking preset cases; retain the legacy temperature-zero/model-default result as diagnostic evidence only.

rules.evidence_basis: Metal README regression covers c1/c4/c16 quality and completion cells.
rules.next_action: Reproduce with typed admission and observed max-active evidence.
